caption: A man wearing glasses, a tall grey wig, a white button-down shirt with a red bowtie, and tan suspenders is speaking into a microphone. He is wearing black over-ear headphones. The scene is set in what appears to be a clothing store, with mannequins, garments, and framed photographs visible in the background. A black professional microphone is positioned in front of him. On-screen graphics include a logo that reads "BOSS TALK JOY" and a smaller logo that says "PODCAST". As the sequence progresses, the man's head and facial expressions shift slightly as he continues to speak, while the background and camera angle remain static.
